title: Qin Shi Huang becomes Emperor of China
fact: Qin Shi Huang was the founder of the Qin dynasty and the first emperor of China.

title: Puyi becomes Emperor of China
fact: Puyi was the last emperor of China, reigning as the eleventh monarch of the Qing dynasty from 1908 to 1912, and a brief return in 1917, when he was forced to abdicate.
